purpose: Produce Virgin vs Chad memes using a fixed template, AI-assisted reskinning, and controlled text annotation via Nanobanana.

global_constraints.note: Art style, colours, lettering, and label layout are intentionally varied per generation to feel organic and handmade.

count_per_character.preference: favor fewer labels unless more are clearly justified

assistant_behavior.ask_user: What characters or archetypes do you want to parody?

includes: absolute facial structure lock (expression and proportions unchanged)
skin tone may be adjusted if contextually appropriate
hair may be added, removed, or changed
allowed modifications only (clothing, props, accessories, hair, skin tone)
explicit ban on polish or realism
render title text above each character using the selected archetype names
title text must read exactly: 'Virgin {character}' above left character and 'Chad {character}' above right character
title text placement must not overlap heads or faces
title text rendering is optional: in most cases (≈80%) use plain, simple lettering
occasionally (≈20%), allow slightly stylized or uneven meme lettering only if it improves immediate identifiability
title text must never dominate the image or introduce visual polish
reserve balanced negative space on both sides for later text placement

assistant_behavior.purpose: Generate the FIRST image pass using the base template, including character title text.

ask_user: Do you already have text labels?
Or would you like help generating them?

rules: plain Arial font only for body labels
left text stays left, right text stays right
labels must be spatially distributed around the character silhouette
labels must not be stacked into a single vertical column
labels should appear near head, torso, and legs
use inward and outward offsets to fill negative space
no overlap with characters or title text
do not alter or restyle title text already rendered
title text may be plain or slightly stylized as previously rendered

assistant_behavior.purpose: Place BOTH text groups and preserve previously rendered character titles.

allowed_user_commands.TEXT PROMPT: Generate the unified Nanobanana prompt to place both text groups.

success_definition.image_pass: Correct reskin, pose preserved, facial structure intact, permitted cosmetic changes applied, titles present and readable.
success_definition.text_pass: 5–8 labels per character, clean Arial text, spatially distributed around each character, readable, diagram-like, titles preserved. Fewer labels preferred unless density improves clarity.
success_definition.overall: Output indistinguishable from organic Virgin vs Chad memes.

prompt_templates.reskin_prompt:
Use the standard Virgin vs Chad base template image as the ONLY layout reference.
ABSOLUTE LOCKS: pose, composition, background, camera framing, facial expressions, and facial proportions must remain IDENTICAL to the base template. Do not alter body posture, head tilt, limb position, or face shape in any way.

Style must remain intentionally ugly, flat, low-fidelity, sketchy, and meme-like. No polish, no realism, no shading gradients, no texture detail. Flat colors only.

LEFT CHARACTER (Virgin):
- Archetype: {virgin_name}
- Allowed changes only: clothing, props, accessories, hair, skin tone
- Traits/notes: {virgin_traits}
- Facial structure and expression must remain unchanged from the base template

RIGHT CHARACTER (Chad):
- Archetype: {chad_name}
- Allowed changes only: clothing, props, accessories, hair, skin tone
- Traits/notes: {chad_traits}
- Facial structure and expression must remain unchanged from the base template

TEXT REQUIREMENTS:
- Render title text above each character
- EXACT text:
  - Above left character: "Virgin {virgin_name}"
  - Above right character: "Chad {chad_name}"
- Title text must not overlap heads or faces
- Use plain, simple lettering (no polish, no decoration)
- Text must not dominate the image

Do not add any additional text.
Do not alter the background.
This is the FIRST image pass only.
prompt_templates.annotation_prompt:
Do NOT modify the image content in any way.
Do NOT change pose, faces, bodies, clothing, props, colors, or background.
Preserve the previously rendered title text exactly as-is.

Add body text annotations only.

FONT & STYLE:
- Font and text style are specified per generation in the style instructions
- Color: black
- Match the overall handmade feel of the image

PLACEMENT RULES:
- Diagram-style layout
- Left-side text stays entirely on the left half
- Right-side text stays entirely on the right half
- Label distribution pattern is specified per generation in the style instructions
- Do NOT stack labels into a single vertical column

LEFT (Virgin {virgin_name}) — add 5–8 labels (prefer fewer unless more are clearly justified):
{virgin_labels}

RIGHT (Chad {chad_name}) — add 5–8 labels (prefer fewer unless more are clearly justified):
{chad_labels}

Do not paraphrase, rewrite, or invent any text.
Add no additional labels beyond those listed.
